summary: Cataloged PRED-072 (TTB midnight fluctuation ±15 nT) in predictions.json with: our_verdict=standard_physics, restates_win=042, data_predates_registration=true, is_genuinely_prospective=false. The Sq daily variation explains the claimed effect. Test window expired April 11, 2026 with no dome result. The prediction does not warrant tracking in uncounted-failures.json because it was never confirmed or explicitly failed by the dome — it simply expired silently. Close ISS-859.
